testcase.name: integrity.manifest_schema
testcase.system-out: Manifest schema valid Expected=checkpoint-manifest-v1; actual=checkpoint-manifest-v1.

testcase.name: integrity.completion_marker
testcase.system-out: Completion marker present Expected=COMPLETE present in final checkpoint; actual=present.

testcase.name: integrity.checksums
testcase.system-out: All payload checksums valid Expected=every manifest payload matches SHA-256 and size; actual=5 payloads validated.

testcase.name: integrity.base_present
testcase.system-out: Base artifact present when required Expected=contained immutable base artifact; actual=present.

testcase.name: integrity.base_hash
testcase.system-out: Base artifact hash matches Expected=c17cc8994c8f0fe6def32423b0e5d9efedffb3cd71c7de9631f26cf505925d86; actual=c17cc8994c8f0fe6def32423b0e5d9efedffb3cd71c7de9631f26cf505925d86.

testcase.name: state.global_step
testcase.system-out: Checkpoint global step is valid Expected=0 < step < 8, consistent across restore; actual=manifest=4, event=4, restored=4.

testcase.name: state.model_or_adapter
testcase.system-out: Model or adapter state restores Expected=serialized adapter and exact trainable-state digest; actual=serialized=True, digest_match=True.

testcase.name: state.optimizer
testcase.system-out: Optimizer state restores when required Expected=serialized optimizer with exact digest; actual=serialized=True, digest_match=True.

testcase.name: state.scheduler
testcase.system-out: Scheduler state restores when required Expected=serialized scheduler with exact digest; actual=serialized=True, digest_match=True.

testcase.name: state.python_rng
testcase.system-out: Python RNG state restores when required Expected=serialized state with exact digest; actual=serialized=True, digest_match=True.

testcase.name: state.numpy_rng
testcase.system-out: NumPy RNG state restores when required Expected=serialized state with exact digest; actual=serialized=True, digest_match=True.

testcase.name: state.torch_rng
testcase.system-out: Torch RNG state restores when required Expected=serialized state with exact digest; actual=serialized=True, digest_match=True.

testcase.name: process.next_step
testcase.system-out: Resumed run continues from the expected next step Expected=first batch at 4, first completion at 5; actual=first batch at 4, first completion at 5.

testcase.name: process.original_pid
testcase.system-out: Original worker PID is recorded Expected=27632; actual=27632.

testcase.name: process.expected_termination
testcase.system-out: Original worker termination is verified Expected=parent termination with nonzero exit code; actual=method=TerminateProcess via subprocess.Popen.kill, exit=1, verified=True.

testcase.name: process.new_recovery_pid
testcase.system-out: Recovery uses a different PID Expected=PID different from 27632; actual=31396.

testcase.name: process.recovery_exit
testcase.system-out: Recovery worker exits successfully Expected=exit code 0; actual=exit=0, verified=True.

testcase.name: rollback.hard_limit
testcase.system-out: Achieved rollback is within the hard limit Expected=<= 0 steps; actual=0 steps.

testcase.name: trajectory.checkpoint_evaluation
testcase.system-out: Fixed evaluation after restore matches Expected=d60572aea12f91960f3f0030bdfdca55fdafe059146c7230af9094923811d312; actual=d60572aea12f91960f3f0030bdfdca55fdafe059146c7230af9094923811d312.

testcase.name: trajectory.final_trainable
testcase.system-out: Final trainable parameters match control Expected=1fc72fdf21487afe7b32da833d2300cd9a68f0c0c6f3ce1456910a5102a92997; actual=1fc72fdf21487afe7b32da833d2300cd9a68f0c0c6f3ce1456910a5102a92997.

testcase.name: trajectory.final_evaluation
testcase.system-out: Final evaluation logits match control Expected=a42a6d25c8aaf6674130ef63439f6fd415824bd23ff9cd6a7c0ca0305be3ef9a; actual=a42a6d25c8aaf6674130ef63439f6fd415824bd23ff9cd6a7c0ca0305be3ef9a.

testcase.name: trajectory.loss_history
testcase.system-out: Continued loss trajectory matches control Expected=exact loss sequence equality; actual=exact match.

testcase.name: safety.path_containment
testcase.system-out: All managed write paths passed containment Expected=all paths contained; symlink escapes rejected; actual=contained.

testcase.name: contract.no_mandatory_omission
testcase.system-out: No mandatory contract requirement was silently omitted Expected=all mandatory continuation state declared; actual=complete.
